raw_consumer_statement: I received a text from Citibank asking if I recognized a {$28.00} charge. I responded with a " N '' which started a chain reaction on Citibanks part to cancel my card and reissue another one. I did not ask for that, they did not notify me and I only realized when the card was declined the next day. I have since telephone Citibank immediately upon knowing this that 7 other charges were NOT disputed and they have yet to resend the money to my vendors. This has resulted in job shut downs, damaged relationships with companies and I have called at least 30 times to Citibank to get the problem resolved. I have repaid the vendors and I am out over {$12000.00} becuase of Citibank 's problem not to mention the amount of relationships that have been damaged. I will be filing an action in Civil court as well as notifying the press of Citibank 's theft of my money
